name: accounting staff at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting staff at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
target_audience: accounting staff at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: reconciliation of vendor invoices and purchase orders
